---
title: "calculating 5km square coordinates"
output: html_document
---

to calculate the coordinates of a 5km square around wytham woods

the coordinates of wytham chalet are: 51.77248375199428, -1.3378001346658057

```{r}
library(sf)
```

```{r}
#create the central point
lon <- -1.3378001346658057
lat <- 51.77248375199428

pt <- st_sfc(st_point(c(lon, lat)), crs = 4326)

#transform to a metric crs (in meters)
pt_utm <- st_transform(pt, 32630)  # UTM zone 30N (covers Oxford, UK)
```

```{r}
#create the corner points of the square
coords <- st_coordinates(pt_utm)

x <- coords[1]
y <- coords[2]

half <- 2500

square <- st_polygon(list(rbind(
  c(x-half, y-half),
  c(x+half, y-half),
  c(x+half, y+half),
  c(x-half, y+half),
  c(x-half, y-half)
)))

square <- st_sfc(square, crs = 32630)
```

```{r}
#convert back to lat/long
square_ll <- st_transform(square, 4326)

st_coordinates(square_ll)
```

```{r}
wkt_square <- st_as_text(square_ll)

wkt_square
```
